missions.title: The Missing Homework
missions.ticket: Grandma: My homework file is gone. Please help me find it.
missions.clue: The file is probably in the wrong folder, not deleted.
missions.tooltip: Use File Explorer search first, then check the file path.
missions.whyItMatters: Users panic when files seem missing. Fast recovery builds trust.
missions.careerConnection: Help desk technicians solve missing file tickets every day.

interactiveDemo.hint: Start with the safest and fastest check.

missions.actionTask: Open File Explorer, search for the file name, and open its folder location.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat the same search with another file and fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Move the file to the wrong folder. Then fix it by moving it back.
explainQuestions: How would you use this in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Grandma is happy. Homework found and path explained.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: The address of a file or folder.
A saved item like a document.

missions.title: The Program That Won't Install
missions.ticket: Mike: I keep getting install errors. Can you get this app working?
missions.clue: The installer source and permissions matter.
missions.tooltip: Use trusted installers and check app status in Settings > Apps.
missions.whyItMatters: Unsafe installs create malware and broken systems.
missions.careerConnection: Endpoint support safely installs and removes approved tools.
missions.actionTask: Install one approved app, open it, then verify it appears in Apps list.
missions.repeatTask: Install/uninstall another safe app with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Leave a broken shortcut after uninstall, then clean it up.
explainQuestions: How would you use this in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Mike can use the app. Installation process documented.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Add software to computer.
Remove software safely.

missions.title: The Mouse That Stopped Working
missions.ticket: Boss: Input is failing on a training PC. Diagnose and recover control.
missions.clue: Check simple causes before complex fixes.
missions.tooltip: Try keyboard alternatives and basic device checks first.
missions.whyItMatters: Quick input recovery keeps users productive.
missions.careerConnection: Technicians triage peripherals during first-line support.

interactiveDemo.prompt: What is the safest first test?

missions.actionTask: Use keyboard navigation to open Settings and verify pointer/device state.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat the diagnostic flow with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Disable pointer speed setting by mistake, then restore it.
explainQuestions: How would you use this in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Input control restored. User can work again.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Key combo that does an action fast.

missions.title: Find Grandma's Pictures
missions.ticket: Grandma: My family pictures disappeared after I moved folders.
missions.clue: Pictures are likely moved, not erased.
missions.tooltip: Use Explorer filters and sort by date modified.
missions.whyItMatters: Recovering personal files builds user trust.
missions.careerConnection: Support roles regularly recover misplaced files.
missions.actionTask: Search for image files, sort by date, and restore them to a clear Pictures folder.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with another file type and fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Place images in wrong location and move them back correctly.
explainQuestions: How would you use this in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Grandma has her pictures back and knows where to find them.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Tool to narrow what you see.

missions.title: Why Is The Computer So Slow?
missions.ticket: Boss: A training machine is very slow. Diagnose and stabilize it.
missions.clue: Check CPU and memory before guessing.
missions.tooltip: Task Manager shows which apps use most resources.
missions.whyItMatters: Slow systems hurt productivity and frustrate users.
missions.careerConnection: Performance triage is a common help desk task.
missions.actionTask: Open Task Manager, sort by CPU, and identify top process.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat while another app is open.
missions.breakFixTask: End the wrong safe process, then relaunch and recover.
explainQuestions: How would you use this in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: System performance improved and findings documented.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: A running program.

missions.title: Sarah Forgot Her Password
missions.ticket: Sarah: I can't log in. I forgot my password.
missions.clue: Account recovery starts with identity verification.
missions.tooltip: Reset password safely and test sign-in.
missions.whyItMatters: Login issues block all work.
missions.careerConnection: Password reset is one of the most common support calls.
missions.actionTask: Reset a local test account password and confirm sign-in.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat reset flow with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Set wrong password policy then correct it.
explainQuestions: How would you use it in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Sarah logs in successfully.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: A personal sign-in profile.

missions.title: The Folder Nobody Can Open
missions.ticket: Boss: Team folder says Access Denied. Fix it without over-permissioning.
missions.clue: Least privilege is safer than full control.
missions.tooltip: Check Security tab and permission inheritance.
missions.whyItMatters: Correct access keeps work moving and data safe.
missions.careerConnection: Permissions troubleshooting is core endpoint support work.
missions.actionTask: Grant read access to the correct user and verify open works.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat on a second folder with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Apply deny entry by mistake, then fix it.
explainQuestions: How would you use it in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Folder access restored with safe permissions.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Rules for what users can do.

missions.title: Find The Setting
missions.ticket: Mike: I can't find where to change this setting.
missions.clue: Settings and Control Panel both matter.
missions.tooltip: Search in both interfaces before escalating.
missions.whyItMatters: Users need quick navigation guidance.
missions.careerConnection: Support roles constantly locate hidden settings.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Where might app settings still live?

missions.actionTask: Find app uninstall location in both Settings and Control Panel.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat navigation with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Change wrong setting and restore it.
explainQuestions: How would you use it in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Mike found the right setting path.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Classic Windows settings area.

missions.title: Share The Family Photos
missions.ticket: Grandma: Please share this photo folder with family.
missions.clue: Sharing and security permissions both affect access.
missions.tooltip: Test access with a non-owner account.
missions.whyItMatters: Shared data must be usable and safe.
missions.careerConnection: Folder sharing setup is common in support operations.
missions.actionTask: Share one folder with one test user and verify access.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat on another folder with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Break share permissions and restore them.
explainQuestions: How would you use it in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Family photo share works correctly and safely.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Allow network folder access.

missions.title: Make The Computer Yours
missions.ticket: Sarah: My screen is hard to read. Can we make it comfortable?
missions.clue: Small display changes can solve big usability pain.
missions.tooltip: Use personalization and accessibility settings safely.
missions.whyItMatters: Readable setups reduce mistakes and fatigue.
missions.careerConnection: IT support improves user productivity through profile tuning.
missions.actionTask: Adjust text size and theme, then verify readability.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with another safe personalization option.
missions.breakFixTask: Set unreadable scaling, then restore comfortable value.
explainQuestions: How would you use it in a real IT job?
missions.ticketCompletion: Sarah now has a comfortable and usable setup.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Settings that make computers easier to use.

missions.title: The Missing Homework
missions.ticket: Grandma says her homework file disappeared before printing.
missions.clue: She saved it yesterday in Documents but clicked around many folders.
missions.tooltip: Use File Explorer search and check the file path before moving anything.
missions.whyItMatters: Users panic when files go missing. Fast recovery builds trust.
missions.careerConnection: Help desk technicians recover lost files all the time.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Which action should you do first?
options: Search by file name in File Explorer
interactiveDemo.hint: Start with the safest information-gathering step.

missions.actionTask: Find the homework file, open its location, and move it to Documents/Homework.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat the same recovery flow without hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Move the file to the wrong folder, then fix it and confirm the final path.
explainQuestions: How would you use this at work?
missions.ticketCompletion: Grandma can open and print her homework again.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: The address of a file or folder.
Looking for a file by name or keyword.
translationTerms.whyItMatters: Saves time when folders are messy.

missions.title: The Program That Won't Install
missions.ticket: Mike needs a browser update but install keeps failing.
missions.clue: He downloaded installers from random websites.
missions.tooltip: Use trusted sources and check installer permissions.
missions.whyItMatters: Unsafe installs create malware and broken systems.
missions.careerConnection: Endpoint support installs approved software safely.

interactiveDemo.hint: Pick the source with verified publisher trust.

missions.actionTask: Install one trusted app and confirm it opens.
missions.repeatTask: Uninstall and reinstall with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Clean leftover shortcuts after uninstall.
explainQuestions: How does this help in IT jobs?
missions.ticketCompletion: Mike's program installs from a trusted source and runs correctly.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Add software to a computer.
Remove software safely.

missions.title: The Mouse That Stopped Working
missions.ticket: A staff member says the mouse is not responding.
missions.clue: Keyboard still works and cursor froze after USB swap.
missions.tooltip: Check simple input settings and reconnect hardware safely.
missions.whyItMatters: Input issues block all work.
missions.careerConnection: Technicians handle keyboard and mouse failures daily.

options: Reconnect device and test another port

missions.actionTask: Reconnect mouse, test pointer speed setting, and confirm response.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat troubleshooting path without hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Set pointer speed too low, then restore usable speed.
explainQuestions: How would you explain this to a user?
missions.ticketCompletion: User can move and click normally again.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: The on-screen arrow controlled by mouse.
translationTerms.whyItMatters: If pointer fails, user cannot navigate.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Connection slot for hardware.

missions.title: Find Grandma's Pictures
missions.ticket: Grandma cannot find family photos from last week.
missions.clue: Photos may be in Downloads or Pictures with similar file names.
missions.tooltip: Use Explorer sort and search by date or keyword.
missions.whyItMatters: Recovering personal files builds user confidence.
missions.careerConnection: Desktop support often locates missing user files.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Best way to narrow photo search?
options: Sort by Date Modified and use keyword

missions.actionTask: Find a target photo and place it into Pictures/Family.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with another photo and fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Move wrong image into Family folder, then fix it.
explainQuestions: How would this help users at work?
missions.ticketCompletion: Grandma can view all family photos in one folder.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Arrange files by rule like date or name.
Default folder for downloaded files.

missions.title: Why Is The Computer So Slow?
missions.ticket: Computer is very slow during normal work.
missions.clue: Several apps start at login and one process spikes CPU.
missions.tooltip: Use Task Manager to inspect CPU, memory, and startup impact.
missions.whyItMatters: Performance problems are top support tickets.
missions.careerConnection: Junior technicians use Task Manager for first diagnosis.

options: Sort by CPU in Task Manager

missions.actionTask: Find top CPU process and document the result.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat while opening another heavy app.
missions.breakFixTask: End wrong non-critical process and reopen app safely.
explainQuestions: How would you report this to a teammate?
missions.ticketCompletion: Computer performance is improved and documented.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Main processor that runs tasks.
translationTerms.whyItMatters: High CPU can make systems slow.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Apps that run when computer starts.
translationTerms.whyItMatters: Too many startup apps slow boot.

missions.title: Sarah Forgot Her Password
missions.ticket: Sarah cannot sign in and needs urgent access.
missions.clue: Her account exists but password is unknown.
missions.tooltip: Verify identity before any reset.
missions.whyItMatters: Account security matters as much as speed.
missions.careerConnection: Password resets are core help desk tasks.
missions.actionTask: Reset a test password and confirm successful sign-in.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat reset flow with fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Set wrong temp password, then correct it.
explainQuestions: How would you communicate this to a user?
missions.ticketCompletion: Sarah signs in successfully and securely.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Confirming the person is who they claim.
Set a new password or setting.

missions.title: The Folder Nobody Can Open
missions.ticket: Team folder shows Access Denied for multiple users.
missions.clue: Permission inheritance changed yesterday.
missions.tooltip: Check Security permissions before changing ownership.
missions.whyItMatters: Permission issues stop teams from working.
missions.careerConnection: Access control is routine endpoint support.
missions.actionTask: Grant read access to the correct user group and retest.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat on a second test folder.
missions.breakFixTask: Accidentally remove needed group, then restore it.
explainQuestions: How do permissions relate to security?
missions.ticketCompletion: Team can access folder with correct rights.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Rules that control access.
Give only required access.

missions.title: Find The Setting
missions.ticket: Mike cannot find where to change app defaults.
missions.clue: Some options are in Settings, others in Control Panel.
missions.tooltip: Check both settings tools based on task type.
missions.whyItMatters: Wrong tool wastes support time.
missions.careerConnection: Help desk moves between both interfaces constantly.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Where to check first for modern app defaults?

missions.actionTask: Find app default settings and change one test association.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with another safe setting.
missions.breakFixTask: Set wrong default app then restore the correct one.
explainQuestions: How would you teach this to a user?
missions.ticketCompletion: Mike can find and update the right setting.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: The app used automatically for a file type.
Classic Windows settings tool.

missions.title: Share The Family Photos
missions.ticket: Grandma wants family photos shared with Sarah only.
missions.clue: Current share is blocked for Sarah.
missions.tooltip: Configure share and security permissions together.
missions.whyItMatters: Sharing is useful only when access is correct and safe.
missions.careerConnection: Desktop support sets shared folders for teams.
missions.actionTask: Share folder with Sarah account and verify open/read access.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with a second folder and fewer hints.
missions.breakFixTask: Remove Sarah permission by mistake then restore it.
explainQuestions: Why did this permission setup work?
How would you secure this in a workplace?
missions.ticketCompletion: Sarah can access photos and no extra users can.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Give network access to folder.
Permission to open or edit files.
translationTerms.whyItMatters: Too much or too little causes issues.

missions.title: Make The Computer Yours
missions.ticket: Sarah wants display and accessibility settings adjusted.
missions.clue: Text looks too small and colors are hard to read.
missions.tooltip: Use personalization and accessibility for usability.
missions.whyItMatters: Readable setups reduce mistakes and frustration.
missions.careerConnection: Support teams tune user environments for productivity.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Which change helps readability most quickly?

missions.actionTask: Adjust text size and theme for readability and verify with user.
missions.repeatTask: Repeat with one additional personalization setting.
missions.breakFixTask: Set unreadable contrast, then restore usable setting.
explainQuestions: How would this matter in IT support?
missions.ticketCompletion: Sarah can read and use the system comfortably.

translationTerms.plainEnglish: Settings that make computer easier to use.
Visual style for colors and backgrounds.
